question.question_text: What will the AUD/USD exchange rate be on 2026-03-27 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a one-day ahead forecast of a major currency pair like AUD/USD, the best point estimate is the current rate (random walk assumption). Daily volatility for AUD/USD is typically around 0.4-0.6% (roughly 30-40 pips on a 0.69 handle). Using an approximate daily standard deviation of ~0.0030 (about 0.43%), the confidence intervals are constructed symmetrically around the current rate: 50% CI covers ~0.67 sigma (~±0.0020), 80% CI covers ~1.28 sigma (~±0.0038), and 90% CI covers ~1.645 sigma (~±0.0049). No strong directional catalyst is assumed, though AUD faces some mild headwinds from global risk sentiment and commodity price uncertainty.
